description.zh-Hans: 在可选的输入缓冲区上绘制抗锯齿线条。
description.en: Draws an anti-aliased line onto an optional input buffer.

triggers.zh-Hans: 线条, 画线, 线段, 抗锯齿线条
triggers.en: line, draw line, line segment, anti-aliased line

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 在输入缓冲区上绘制抗锯齿的白色线段，用于像素艺术中的装饰线条。
exampleUsage.en: Draw an anti-aliased white line segment on an input buffer for decorative lines in pixel art.
